REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1271-1273 21st Avenue, San Francisco Ca 94122)
Off Calendar Nov-04-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Lew for (administrator) Rodney Leung. Warren Woo appearing specially for the estate.

The sale was confirmed at $1,850,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond is not required.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
